home.systemDescription: An integrated management system for the Healthy City program according to WHO standards, tracking progress across 9 axes and 80 international standards.

features.healthDesc: International health and environmental standards accredited by WHO
features.standardsDesc: 9 main axes covering all aspects of the healthy city
features.trackingDesc: Integrated system for managing tasks, evidence, and reports
features.sustainabilityDesc: Sustainable improvement of quality of life and community services

home.copyright: © {{year}} All rights reserved to Ali Al-Shahri

survey.title: Family Field Survey
survey.subtitle: WHO Standards Survey Form
survey.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, family number, or district...
survey.tryChangingFilters: Try changing search criteria or filters
survey.startFirstSurvey: Start by creating the first field survey
survey.noAccess: You do not have permission to access the survey page.
survey.noAccessNote: Permissions are linked to your role in the team.
survey.childrenEnrolledSchool: Number of Children Enrolled in School (5-14 years)
survey.skillsDetails: Skills Details (type of each skill per member)
survey.safeWaterQuestion: Does the family have year-round access to safe drinking water?
survey.safeWaterNote: Access means water available within a 15-minute walk
survey.hasToiletQuestion: Does the family have sanitary toilets inside the home?
survey.hasBathroomQuestion: Does the family have a bathroom inside the home?
survey.garbageSystemQuestion: Is there a garbage collection system or garbage bin for the family?
survey.incomeLessThanDollar: Does the family earn less than one dollar per person per day?
survey.balancedDietQuestion: Does the family eat meat, fish, eggs, milk, fruit, and vegetables at least twice a week?
survey.healthyMarketsQuestion: Does the family have physical and financial access to healthy markets/shops?
survey.breastfeedingCount: Number of exclusively breastfed children (over 6 months)
survey.liveBirthQuestion: Were there any live births in the past 12 months?
survey.vaccinationQuestion: Have all children received vaccinations against preventable diseases?
survey.infantDeathQuestion: Were there deaths of infants under 1 year in the past year?
survey.childDeath1to5Question: Were there deaths of children aged 1-5 in the past year?
survey.maternalDeathQuestion: Did any pregnant woman die in the past year?
survey.pregnantQuestion: Is there any pregnant woman in the family currently?
survey.tetanusVaccinationQuestion: Has the pregnant woman received tetanus immunization?
survey.trainedVisitQuestion: Has a trained person visited the pregnant woman?
survey.smokersCount: Number of smokers in the family
survey.chronicDiseaseQuestion: Has any family member been diagnosed with chronic diseases?
survey.chronicDiseaseDetailsLabel: Details (heart, kidney, liver, diabetes, blood pressure, cancer, other)
survey.disabilityQuestion: Does any family member suffer from disability?
survey.deathFromDiseasesQuestion: Were there deaths from chronic diseases or accidents?
survey.healthFacilityAccessQuestion: Does the family have access to health facilities within 30 minutes walking?
survey.healthServicesSatisfaction: Is the family satisfied with the health services?
survey.sportsFacilitiesAccess: Is there access to sports facilities?
survey.sportsParticipation: Do family members participate in weekly healthy sports activities?
survey.greenAreasAccess: Is there access to green areas?
survey.infrastructureSatisfaction: Are family members satisfied with roads, housing, infrastructure, water and sanitation?
survey.transportAccess: Is there access to local transportation within 30 minutes?
survey.socialContribution: Has any member financially contributed to social services in the past year?
